entries.source: "Opportunity cost"
entries.value: "Gharama ya fursa"

entries.source: "Should a company enter this market?"
entries.value: "Je, kampuni inapaswa kuingia katika soko hili?"

entries.source: "What makes an argument valid?"
entries.value: "Ni nini hufanya hoja kuwa ya kweli?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Socratic Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Mwongozo wa vitendo wa kutumia Socratic Instruction kwenye inspir kwa kujifunza misingi, ukiwa na vidokezo, mizunguko ya masomo, na tabia salama zaidi za AI.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Mzunguko imara zaidi wa kusoma

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Mkufunzi wa AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Omba hatua ndogo ya kwanza badala ya jibu la mwisho.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Iombe AI ikague mantiki yako, si matokeo tu.

entries.source: Build a hypothesis.
entries.value: Jenga dhana.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Malizia kwa kuandika wazo tena kutoka kumbukumbu.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Misingi

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka kufikiria mada, kupima dhana, na kujenga uelewa wa kudumu.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Vidokezo vya kujaribu

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: geuza dhana, hoja, tatizo, maandishi, au uamuzi kuwa mlolongo wa maswali uliolenga. Rafiki yako husikiliza kila jibu, huchora dhana za msingi na mapengo, na hukusukuma kuelekea usanisi wako wa mwisho. Jaribu: "Help me understand opportunity cost."

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: Socratic Instruction
entries.value: Maelekezo ya Kisokrates

entries.source: Start the live mode at Socratic Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Collaborative Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Anza hali ya moja kwa moja kwenye Socratic Instruction. Ikiwa unataka muundo wa kujifunza unaokaribiana, jaribu Collaborative Instruction. Kwa mtazamo mpana zaidi wa jukwaa, soma kile ambacho mwenzi wa kujifunza wa AI anapaswa kufanya kwa kila mtu.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Iambie hali unachojaribu kujifunza au kutengeneza.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Tofauti hiyo huonekana katika mtiririko. Badala ya jibu moja kubwa, vipindi bora hupitia mzunguko: weka lengo, jaribu kitu, pata mrejesho, rekebisha sehemu dhaifu, na chagua hatua inayofuata.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Mkazo huo ni muhimu. Chatbot ya jumla inaweza kujibu karibu chochote, lakini hali ya kujifunza huipa mazungumzo umbo. Hukuelekeza kwenye aina ya kufikiri, mazoezi, mrejesho, au uchunguzi unaosaidia wazo kushikamana.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Mkufunzi huuliza swali moja kwa wakati mmoja, anasubiri hoja zako, na kutoa muhtasari baada tu ya wewe kujaribu.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hii ndiyo tabia ile ile iliyo nyuma ya kusoma kwa AI bila kujidanganya: mfanye mwanafunzi abaki hai. AI ina manufaa zaidi inapokupa mrejesho kuhusu kufikiri kwako.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hali hii ina manufaa hasa kwa wanafunzi wanaotaka:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Jaribu hatua kwa maneno yako mwenyewe.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model.
entries.value: Geuza kuchanganyikiwa kuwa mtazamo ulio wazi zaidi.

entries.source: Use hints before answers.
entries.value: Tumia vidokezo kabla ya majibu.

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Tumia Socratic Instruction unapotaka kipindi kinachoanza haraka lakini bado kinajirekebisha kulingana nawe. Lengo la kwanza si kusikika wa kuvutia. Lengo la kwanza ni kufanya hatua inayofuata ihisi inawezekana.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Hali hii husaidia nini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Pa kwenda baadaye

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Unaweza pia kuanza na toleo lisilo kamili la tatizo lako halisi. Kidokezo cha kwanza kisicho safi ni sawa. Kipindi kinaweza kufafanua kiwango, hadhira, muda wa mwisho, na mtindo mara tu unapoanza.
